_comment: OKX demo trading overlay. Apply ON TOP of config_dry.json + config_secrets.json + config_telegram.json. Freqtrade does deep-merge so only the keys here override; everything else (pair_whitelist, max_open_trades, initial_state, order_types, pricing, api_server, telegram, etc.) inherits from config_dry.json. The two ccxt headers route requests to OKX's simulated-trading endpoint. dry_run=false so freqtrade actually sends orders to OKX (demo matching engine, not real money).
